name: us-mutiny-mayflower
description: Mutiny on the Mayflower — Unit 1 U.S. History dialogue game (TEKS 8.3B, 8.1B, 8.15A, 8.19A). Play William Bradford on the storm-blown Mayflower, November 1620, and talk Separatists and Strangers into signing the Mayflower Compact — where every right answer is one of the Compact's real ideas in kid words. Server-authoritative Socket.IO backend with a live Teacher Command Center.
comment: No npm workspaces: this drive is exFAT, which cannot host the symlinks/junctions workspace linking requires. server/ and client/ install independently; `npm install` here cascades via postinstall.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server --no-fund --no-audit && npm install --prefix client --no-fund --no-audit
